note: Live output from the deployed QueueStorm Investigator for a public sample case.

request.complaint: I sent 5000 taka to a wrong number around 2pm today. The number was supposed to be 01712345678 but I think I typed it wrong. The person isn't responding to my call. Please help me get my money back.

response.agent_summary: Ticket received and queued for review.
response.recommended_next_action: Review the ticket details and follow the appropriate workflow.
response.customer_reply: Thank you for reaching out. Our team will review your case and contact you through official support channels. Please do not share your PIN or OTP with anyone.
